title: Tears of Despiar Nightmare Fuel
description: A complete overhaul of minecraft. Ramps up the difficulty a lot
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0245163a764b65f6e08d1a3d7cf2826ae09c92eb_0.webp)
# Tears of Despair
> ## Nightmare Fuel Edition
**This mod is a aiming to be a complete changeover simmilar to B.T.W or M.I.T.E
it's much harder than regular minecraft while not being as hard as B.T.W or M.I.T.E (that will change)**

> ### Little Features Update

<details>
<summary>Changed mechanics</summary>

- **Item rarity**
- **Recipes**
- **Crop Farming**
- **Fishing**
- **Mining**
- **Progressive difficulty**

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mechanics to be changed</summary>

- **Pets**
- **Fighting**
- **Mob AI**
- **Clothing making, cuz clothes are luxury**
- **Crop Farming again**
- **Animal Farming**
- **Smelting, Smithing, Crafting, Fletching**
- **Customizable world and difficulty simmilar to Don't Starve Together**
- **Difficulty presets, no hardcore (replaced with gamerule)**
- **More gamerules**
- **Harder raids**

</details>

### More coming in future updates
![Progress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fabf957c4b1020c96ed1adcbe2a2ca7c75297453.png)

**To see the roadmap check [milanote](https://app.milanote.com/1TRlM81AJfJVeW?p=qOHW6eoVvyO)**

### This mod is being recoded by scratch
**Current dev version: 1.21.10**

``Do not redistribute or modify``
